backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the bookstore backend with authorization, user profile management, book CRUD operations, and order placement/retrieval using access-controlled endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping each product feature (catalog, book detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, etc.) to their implementing frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, page, hook, and context.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file applying Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and destructive colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the tree in CartProvider and ThemeProvider, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookFormMo: A modal dialog form for adding or editing a book, with validation and submission via useAddBook/useUpdateBook hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/BooksManag: Admin tab displaying a table of all books with options to add, edit, or delete entries using query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin tab showing all orders in a searchable, sortable table with buyer details, totals, and status badges.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: A full-page screen shown when a non-admin user attempts to access a restricted page, with a link back to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A blocking modal that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and contact info to complete profile setup.
frontend/src/components/BookCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a book's cover image, discount badge, out-of-stock overlay, category, title, author, and formatted price with strikethrough for discounted items.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and an attribution link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, navigation links, cart icon with item count, user profile display, and Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that wraps all pages with the Header, Footer, and a main content area rendered via Outlet.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state, persisting items to sessionStorage with BigInt serialization/deserialization support. Exposes add, remove, update, and clear operations along with computed totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and an optional admin token from URL params. Invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via a React context provider and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, books CRUD, admin checks, and order placement, each wired to the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a warm bookshop-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that guards access by checking authentication and admin status, then renders tabbed Books and Orders management sections.
frontend/src/pages/BookDetailPage.tsx: Book detail page that fetches and displays a single book's cover, metadata, pricing with discount, and an add-to-cart button with brief confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with item list, quantity controls, and remove options. Shows login prompt if unauthenticated or empty-cart state if no items are present.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Renders the full book catalog with a hero banner, search input, and category filter. Displays a responsive grid of BookCard components with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Handles the checkout flow by collecting buyer name and contact, validating inputs, and submitting an order via the placeOrder mutation. Stores confirmation data in sessionStorage and redirects on success.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Reads order confirmation data from sessionStorage and displays a success screen with buyer info, itemized order list, and total. Redirects to home if no confirmation data is found.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Fetches and displays the authenticated user's past orders sorted by date, with status badges and loading skeletons. Shows a login prompt if unauthenticated or an empty state if no orders exist.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography/font families, border radius, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a BookStore community app's existing features, architectural notes (no WhatsApp/email, canister-stored orders), required images, and known issues across schema version 3.
